title: Section 44
content: 1[44. Enumeration of municipal authorities.---For the efficient performance of its functions, there shall be the following municipal authorities under 2[3[the Corporation]], namely:-- (a) the Standing Committee; (b) the Wards Committee; and (c) the Commissioner.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 67 of 1993, s. 38, for section 44 (w.e.f 1-10-1993). 2. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “the area of the Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022). 3. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012).
